body: Hi, my daughter will be starting kindergarten in September and I want to make sure I have all the right paperwork. The website lists several forms but I'm not sure which ones are required vs. optional.

Welcome to CRUSD! For kindergarten enrollment you'll need: a completed enrollment form, proof of residency (utility bill or lease), your child's birth certificate, and up-to-date immunization records. You can find all forms at cascaderidgesd.org/enroll or stop by the Maplewood front office.
Perfect, thank you! Do I need a physical copy of the birth certificate or will a photo on my phone work?

We do need to see the original or a certified copy — a phone photo won't be accepted, sorry. The front office staff can make a copy for our records and hand it right back to you. This ticket is all set — marking it solved!
Route 14 dropped the Elm & Pine stop without any notice. My son is in 5th grade and now has to walk along a busy road with no sidewalk. This is a safety issue.

Mr. Kowalski, thank you for flagging this. I'm checking with our transportation department on the route change now — there was a road construction update that affected several stops. I'll have a full answer by end of day tomorrow.

Update: the stop was temporarily moved to Elm & Oak (one block east) due to a water main project on Pine. The construction is scheduled to finish September 20th and the original stop will be restored. We're also adding a safety crossing flag post at the new temporary stop this week.
Thank you for looking into it. Elm & Oak works fine. I just wish we'd received a notice before it changed — can the district send automated alerts for these situations?

Totally fair feedback. I've passed that along to our communications team — we are working on adding bus route change notifications to our parent alert system. Keeping this ticket open until the original stop is restored on the 20th.

I loaded $40 onto my son's lunch account on September 1st and by September 13th it's down to $6. That's $34 in 9 school days which seems way too high. He says he only gets the regular lunch, no extras.
Hi Ms. Brennan, I can pull the transaction log for your son's account. Can you confirm the student ID or date of birth so I can look this up accurately?
His student ID is 2019-4472, DOB March 14, 2013. Thank you for looking into it.

I found the issue — it looks like he was charged for a second milk each day that he did not actually purchase. This appears to be a cafeteria POS scanning error. I've submitted a correction request and a $14 credit should appear on his account within 2 business days.
I've tried the forgot password link three times and I'm not getting any email. I've checked spam. Parent-teacher conferences are tomorrow and I need to print my son's grades.

Hi Mr. Saleh, we had a brief issue with our email delivery service this afternoon that's now resolved. I've manually triggered a password reset to omar.saleh.family@gmail.com — please check your inbox in the next few minutes. If it still doesn't arrive, reply here and I'll reset it directly.
Got it! I'm in now. Thank you for the fast help.
Glad to hear it — marking this solved. Good luck at conferences tonight!
The printed calendar from back-to-school night lists November 27 as a regular school day but the website shows it as a Thanksgiving recess day. Which one should I trust? I need to arrange childcare.

Hi Ms. Vásquez, the website is correct — November 27 is a no-school day as part of the Thanksgiving break. The printed calendars had an error and a correction notice was sent home last Friday. November 27 through November 29 are all non-school days.
Thank you, that's a relief! I'll arrange childcare for those days.
Sounds good — ticket resolved.

We just transferred from Oregon and need to submit shot records for my 3rd grader. I found the enrollment portal but I don't see any way to upload documents. There's no button or link for attachments.

Welcome to the district, Mr. Nakamura! The document upload feature is on the second tab in the enrollment portal labeled 'Health Records.' If you're still having trouble finding it, you can also email the records directly to health@cascaderidgesd.org with your child's full name and student ID in the subject line.
Found it! The tab wasn't obvious on mobile but it worked fine on my laptop. Records submitted.
Records received and confirmed by the school nurse. Marking this ticket solved.
I submitted the free/reduced meal application online on October 1st and it's been 3 weeks with no response. My daughter is being charged full price every single day. At $3.50 a day this adds up fast.

Ms. Petrov, I'm very sorry for the delay — your application should not have taken this long. I'm escalating this to our nutrition services coordinator right now and will ask them to expedite a review. In the meantime, your daughter's account will be put on a temporary hold status so she isn't charged while the application processes.
Thank you, that's a huge relief. How long will the expedited review take?

Nutrition services said they can turn around expedited reviews within 3 business days. You'll get an email directly from them to sonya.petrov@yahoo.com once a determination is made. I'll keep this ticket pending until we confirm you've heard back.
Received the approval email today — we were approved for free meals. Thank you for pushing this through.
Is there an online option for field trip permission slips? My daughter's class has a trip to the science museum on November 15 and they sent home paper but I'd prefer to do it online if possible.

Hi Mr. Morris! Digital permission slips are available for most field trips in the ParentPortal under Activities > Upcoming Field Trips. However, for the November 15 museum trip the teacher is specifically requesting physical signatures — you should still be able to sign the paper one and return it with your daughter.
Got it, that makes sense. Will sign the paper one today. Thanks!
Great — ticket resolved.
My son was home sick yesterday and I forgot to call the attendance line. I'm worried it'll show as unexcused. Is there a way to submit a written excuse now?

No worries, Ms. Quinn! You have up to 5 school days to submit a written excuse. You can email the school attendance office at attendance.cedarbluff@cascaderidgesd.org with the date, your child's name and ID, and a brief reason. Alternatively you can bring a note to the front office.
Sent the email just now. Thank you for the quick response.
Email received and the absence has been updated to excused. Marking this ticket solved.
Quarter 1 report cards were supposedly released today but I can't see anything new in the portal. Other parents in my chat group say they can view theirs just fine. Is there a glitch with my account?

Hi Ms. Abara, I checked your portal account and it looks like your daughter's teacher access permissions were set up incorrectly — report cards are linked to the student ID rather than the family account. I've corrected the link and you should see her report card now when you log in.
I can see it now! Thank you. One follow-up question — where do I go to request a conference with the teacher about the report card?

You can request a conference directly through the portal under Messages > Contact Teacher, or email your daughter's teacher directly. The teacher usually responds within 1-2 school days to set up a time.
We requested an IEP review meeting on November 6th and have not heard back from anyone. My son's current IEP expires on December 15th and if we don't meet before then his services could be disrupted.

Mr. Dunbar, I sincerely apologize for this lapse. I'm flagging this to the special education coordinator immediately — IEP meetings must legally occur within the required timeline and we take this very seriously. Expect a call from the SpEd office within 24 hours.

Thank you. I received a call from Ms. Rivera in the special ed office this afternoon and we scheduled the IEP meeting for December 5th. Still a bit frustrated it took a help desk ticket but glad it's moving now.

I completely understand your frustration and I've also relayed your feedback to the department head so we can improve our internal response process. Glad the meeting is confirmed — I'll leave this ticket open until after December 5th to ensure everything went smoothly.
My daughter returned a library book on October 31st and has a date-stamped drop slip to prove it, but she was charged a $12 overdue fine. Can this please be removed?
Hi Ms. Torres, no problem — if she has the drop-box receipt that's all we need. Please email a photo of it to library@cascaderidgesd.org with your daughter's student ID and I'll get the fine waived.
Photo sent to that email just now. Student ID is 2021-0087.
Fine has been removed and the book marked returned in the system. Ticket solved!
My son started 6th grade in August and still doesn't have a locker as of late November. He has been hauling a very heavy backpack every single day. Who handles locker assignments at Maplewood?

Ms. Nwosu, I'm so sorry about this — locker assignments should have happened in the first week of school. I've contacted the Ridgeview front office directly. Can you confirm which school your son attends and his homeroom teacher?
He's at Ridgeview Middle, homeroom is Mr. Castillo, 6th grade team B.

Ridgeview front office confirmed he was accidentally left off the assignment list — they've assigned him locker 214 with combination 18-34-07. He can pick up a lock from the main office today. Ticket solved!

We moved in late November and are now in the Ridgeview attendance zone instead of Cedar Bluff. My daughter is in 8th grade — is the transfer process simple or do we need to start everything from scratch?

Mr. Bergström, mid-year transfers within the district don't require full re-enrollment. You'll need to complete a Transfer Request form (available at cascaderidgesd.org/transfer) and submit proof of your new address. Her records will transfer automatically. The process typically takes 3-5 school days.
Thank you. I submitted the form and proof of address yesterday. Is there anything else I need to do? Should she keep going to Cedar Bluff in the meantime?

Yes, please have her continue at Cedar Bluff until you receive the official transfer confirmation email — that confirms her start date at Ridgeview. I'll follow up with the enrollment office on the status of your request this week.

I tried to register my son for the spring after-school STEM program and the portal says the session is full. He's been in this program every semester for two years. Is there a waitlist I can get him on?

Hi Ms. Delgado, yes there is a waitlist — I've added your son manually as he wasn't able to sign up through the portal. Given his two-year participation history I'll flag him as a priority. The program coordinator usually pulls from the waitlist within the first two weeks of the semester.
Thank you so much. Should I do anything else or just wait to hear back?
Just wait — you'll get an email from after-school@cascaderidgesd.org if a spot opens. I'll keep this ticket open and follow up if you haven't heard by January 22nd.
My daughter's teacher suggested she could benefit from summer school math. What's the deadline to enroll and do I need a referral from the teacher or can I sign up on my own?
We moved two streets over this past weekend and I need to update our bus stop. We're on Route 9 and the new closest stop is Oak Ave and 5th Street. How do I get this changed for Monday?

Hi Ms. Brennan, for a bus stop change due to a move we need updated proof of address on file before transportation will make the change. Can you email a copy of your new lease or utility bill to enrollment@cascaderidgesd.org? Once confirmed, transportation is usually updated within 2 school days.
Sent the lease agreement now. Will the change be in place before Friday? My son starts at the old stop on Monday and it's quite a distance from the new house.

I flagged it as urgent to the transportation team. They've confirmed the stop change to Oak Ave & 5th is active starting Wednesday February 5th. Your son should use the old stop Tuesday and the new one from Wednesday onward.

The Chromebook my son checked out from school won't power on at all. We've tried two different chargers including the one that came with it. He has a major science project due Friday and can't work on it.

Mr. Nakamura, please bring the device to the school's tech help desk (room 104, open 7:30–8:15am and 3:00–3:45pm) first thing tomorrow morning. They can do a same-day swap if the device is determined to be defective, which should give him plenty of time before Friday.
He went first thing Tuesday morning and got a replacement Chromebook on the spot. Crisis averted! The tech desk staff was really helpful.
Spirit week is supposed to be next week (January 14-18) but the school website and ParentPortal both just say TBD. My daughter wants to plan her outfits. Can someone please post the theme schedule?

Hi Mr. Morris! The student council just finalized the themes late last week — they are: Mon: Jersey Day, Tue: Decades Day, Wed: Twin Day, Thu: Class Color Day, Fri: School Spirit Day. I've updated the portal and website — should be live within the hour.
Perfect timing, my daughter is very excited about Decades Day! Thank you.
Enjoy spirit week! Ticket solved.

I submitted my volunteer background check paperwork on March 3rd and it's now April 14th — six weeks — and I still don't know if I've been cleared. The spring carnival volunteer deadline is April 21st.

Ms. Quinn, I'm sorry for the slow turnaround — background checks are processed through the county and can take 4-8 weeks depending on volume. Let me check with HR on your specific application status. Can you confirm the email address you used when you submitted?
I used deborahquinn@outlook.com. The carnival is April 26th so I have a little more time than I thought but I'd still love to know my status.
HR confirmed your application is in the final stage of county review and the clearance should arrive by April 22nd. I'll update this ticket the moment we have confirmation.
The portal now requires a verification code sent by text but it's going to my old phone number. I no longer have that number and I can't access my account at all. I need to update my contact info.

Ms. Torres, for account recovery when 2FA is on an old number we need to verify your identity in person or via a video call. Please bring a government ID to the district office (Room 12) or reply here to schedule a brief Zoom call with me. Once verified I can update your phone number and restore access.
Can we do a Zoom call? I can do any morning this week before 9am.
I've sent a Zoom invite to meiling.torres@icloud.com for Thursday May 8th at 8:30am. See you then!
Zoom call completed, identity confirmed. Still waiting for the phone number update to process on the portal side.
Phone number updated in the system — please try logging in again and the 2FA code should now go to your new number. Let me know if you have any issues.
My son will be finishing 8th grade at Ridgeview and is going to Cedar Bluff High School in the fall. Do I need to do anything for enrollment or is it automatic since he's already in the district?
The equity audit flagged access gaps at east-side buildings. Our family at Roosevelt HS still cannot log the classroom platform reliably. What is the district's follow-through timeline?
Thank you for reaching out. We are tracking this under the CRUSD equity audit follow-through workstream for Roosevelt HS. Angela Marsh will circle back with a written update this week.
